title: [PATCH] Check existing version locks for the MCP package
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Version locks secured
gist.blurb: We've updated our CI/CD pipeline to check for existing version locks before publishing the MCP package. This keeps our release process smooth and prevents duplicate publish errors.
gist.summary: Added a version check to the publish workflow to prevent attempting to publish an MCP package version that already exists on npm or GitHub Packages.
gist.impact: The CI pipeline will now cleanly skip publishing if a version is already live, reducing failed runs and keeping the release process tidy.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about checking versions and locking them before publishing (packages/boxes). Characters: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot. They are inspecting a package or a lock on a shipping box.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot inspecting a glowing digital padlock on a cardboard shipping box. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
